commit.message:
test(web): useMattermost reconnect / bot poll / connect 错误分支覆盖 (#1075)

## Summary

延续 #1071 merged 的进展，覆盖之前 deferred 的三块源码分支 — **reconnect
scheduling**、**pollBotStatus**、**connect() 错误路径**，不改动产线代码。

### 新增 11 个测试

**reconnect scheduling (5)**
- ws onDisconnect → `scheduleReconnect` → state=`reconnecting`
- intentionalDisconnect 守卫：`disconnect()` 后 ws onDisconnect 不重启
- duplicate timer 守卫：重复 onDisconnect 不重复 scheduleReconnect
- 成功 reconnect → 回到 `connected`、`isReconnectExhausted=false`
- MAX_RECONNECT_ATTEMPTS (5) 耗尽 → `isReconnectExhausted=true` + 错误消息

**pollBotStatus (4)** — 由 `connect(..., botUserId)` 驱动
- bot 一次就 online → 单次 fetchUserStatus 调用
- offline → offline → online → 第 3 次连上
- fetchUserStatus reject 当作 not-online，继续轮询
- BOT_POLL_MAX_ATTEMPTS (24) 耗尽 → `connect()` 捕获 → state=`disconnected`
+ "Bot is not available"

**connect() 错误 (2)**
- `validateToken` reject → state=`disconnected` + error 设置
- `ws.connect()` 后台 reject → state 保持 `connected`（fire-and-forget），但
`captureMMConnectionFailure({ reason: 'ws_connect_failed' })` 被调用

### Harness 扩展

- `FakeWs` 新增 `__fireDisconnect` / `__disconnectCalls`
- 模块级 `wsConnectMode` 控制所有后续 ws 实例的 connect() resolve/reject（测试
reconnect 链必需）
- `vi.mock('@/lib/sentry/mattermostMonitor')` 防 reconnect 循环触发 Sentry
真实副作用

### Fake timer 策略

- `setupConnectedHook` 用 real timers（`waitFor` 依赖）
- 连接完成后切 `vi.useFakeTimers()` 跑 reconnect/poll 链，`afterEach` 保底
`vi.useRealTimers()`
- 避免 waitFor + fake-timers 混用（web/CLAUDE.md 明文规则）

## Test plan

- [x] 43/43 useMattermost.unit.spec 测试通过（32→43）
- [x] 3212/3212 全量 unit 测试通过
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` clean
- [x] `pnpm lint` clean
- [ ] CI 绿

## 关联

- Epic #894 web coverage roadmap
- 续 #1071（已 merged）— deferred: reconnect scheduling / bot poll / connect
errors

test(web): useMattermost 补覆盖 reaction/typing/sendMessage/杂项 (#901 Step 7b) (#1071)

## Summary

Plan Step 7b——useMattermost hook (839 行) 原 48% 覆盖，~400 行未覆盖。本 PR 针对
reaction events / typing events / sendMessage / loadMoreHistory /
disconnect / autoConnect / clearWaitingForBotReply 这些高 ROI 分支补齐 **23
tests**，推到 **65.6% lines / 68.1% statements**（+20 pp）。

## 23 新 tests / 365 行

| 分组 | tests | 覆盖点 |
|---|---|---|
| reaction events | 8 | reaction_added 追加 / 幂等 / 累积 / reaction_removed
匹配移除 / 单条时删 key / 非匹配 no-op / malformed JSON 吞 / 字段缺失吞 |
| typing events | 4 | bot typing → waiting=true / self typing ignore / 跨
channel 隔离 / malformed payload no-op |
| sendMessage | 5 | 空 text+无 files no-op / whitespace+files 仍调 / success
路径 / server 返空 post throw / sendPost reject → setError + rethrow |
| misc API | 7 | loadMoreHistory (next page + hasMore + no active
channel + error) / disconnect 重置状态 / autoConnect 已连时跳过 /
clearWaitingForBotReply |

## 暂跳过（test file 已加注释说明）

- **reconnect scheduling** — 需扩 FakeWs 加 `__fireDisconnect` hook 触发
disconnect handlers 才能测 scheduleReconnect 的指数退避 + 耗尽
- **bot polling** — `pollBotStatus` 的 retry loop +
`BOT_POLL_INTERVAL_MS` 延迟，涉 fake timer + 异步循环，工时 ROI 不如优先别的 gap
- **connect() error branches** — validateToken / WS connect 拒绝的完整 error
path

## 覆盖率提升

| | before | after | 变化 |
|---|---|---|---|
| lines | 45.64% | **65.6%** | +20 pp |
| statements | 48.66% | **68.1%** | +19 pp |
| branches | 37.67% | **56.3%** | +19 pp |
| functions | 38.09% | **57.1%** | +19 pp |

## Test plan

- [x] 32/32 tests 本地全绿 (1.35s)
- [x] `pnpm lint` 干净
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` 干净
- [ ] CI 绿

commit.message:
test(web): ChannelsSection 全面覆盖 (#899 Step 5e — 收尾) (#1070)

## Summary

Step 5 收尾——Claw Settings 的 \`ChannelsSection\` (869 行) 原先 0 测试。Step 5
最后一块。

子 wizards (Feishu/Telegram/Slack/Discord) 各自独立 spec 已合入；本 PR 将它们 mock 为
stub，聚焦 Section + ChannelCard + StatusBadge + AddChannelModal 的编排 / 渲染 /
状态机。

## 47 tests / 576 行

| 分组 | tests | 覆盖点 |
|---|---|---|
| render gates | 6 | botRunning × redeploying 矩阵 / empty state /
restarting banner / button disabled |
| channel card 渲染 | 4 | platform / account / status / group policy /
emoji fallback |
| StatusBadge | 8 | 6 已知 status (\`it.each\`) + empty fallback to
dm_policy + 未知裸展示 |
| remove 确认流 | 4 | yes/no toggle / 成功 feishu 触发 onFeishuRestartNeeded /
失败**不**触发 |
| pairing 流 | 7 | Pair 按钮 / empty disabled / trim / success panel /
failure / cancel / autoExpand via lastAddedPlatform |
| AddChannelModal 编排 | 13 | 4 guided path + advanced fallback / 必填校验 /
onAdd payload trim / 3 wizards onSuccess→onRefresh / feishu 双回调 / error
surface |
| Edit 流 | 2 | 编辑 + dm_policy='open' 自动补 allow_from=['*'] |

## 技术要点

- **Modal submit vs outer trigger 同文本**: 两个按钮共享 i18n key，加
\`getModalSubmit\` helper 用 \`getAllByText(...)[1]\` 精确定位
- **子 wizard mock 为 close/success 双按钮 stub**: 让测试可以精确触发 wizard
生命周期而不引入实际内部逻辑
- **positive + negative 对称**: "feishu remove 成功→触发" 配 "失败→不触发"，防 false
positive 信号

吸收 #1047-#1068 review 教训：jest-dom / toBeDisabled / 强断言 / 无冗余 waitFor

## Step 5 收尾

| Wizard / Component | PR | Tests |
|---|---|---|
| FeishuSetupModal | #1047 | 24 |
| TelegramSetupWizard | #1056 | 24 |
| SlackSetupWizard | #1065 | 30 |
| IntegrationsSection | #1068 | 22 |
| **ChannelsSection** | 本 PR | **47** |
| **Step 5 合计** | | **147 tests** |

## Test plan

- [x] 47/47 tests 本地全绿 (370ms)
- [x] pnpm lint 干净
- [x] npx tsc --noEmit 干净
- [x] 全仓 217 files / 3223 passed / 1 todo (+47 vs baseline)
- [ ] CI 绿

test(web): IntegrationsSection 全面覆盖 (#899 Step 5d) (#1068)

## Summary

Step 5 追加——claw-settings \`IntegrationsSection\` (194 行) 原先 0
测试。Third-party OAuth 连接管理 UI：Connected Services 区 + Available
Integrations 区 + toggle / disconnect / connect 交互 + 异步 \`handleConnect\`
流程（window.open popup）。

## 22 tests / 235 行

| 分组 | tests | 覆盖点 |
|---|---|---|
| section 可见性 | 3 | 空状态 / 部分连 / 全连时的 heading 显隐 |
| status badge | 4 | \`connected\`/\`pending\`/\`error\` 各 badge + 未知不渲染
(it.each) |
| 可选字段 | 3 | account_name / error_message / 都空 |
| ConnectedCard 交互 | 6 | disconnect + toggle (仅 connected 可见 / enabled ↔
onDisable / !enabled ↔ onEnable) + saving disables |
| handleConnect | 5 | onConnect 调用 / authUrl window.open 正确尺寸 / null → 不
open / 仅该 provider 按钮 connecting 时 disabled / saving 全 disabled |
| Info | 1 | "1 credit" 文案 |

## 吸收前序 review 教训一次到位

- jest-dom matchers (\`toBeInTheDocument\` / \`toBeDisabled\` /
\`not.toBeDisabled\`)
- 强断言（verify API params + payload）
- 无 \`.not.toThrow()\` 噪音 / 无冗余 \`waitFor\`
- 用真实 \`AVAILABLE_PROVIDERS\` import（10+ providers），不
mock——全连状态测试动态生成全部连接，避免写死枚举值漏 follow
- \`window.open\` 用 \`vi.spyOn(window, 'open').mockReturnValue(null)\` +
\`restoreAllMocks\`

## 关键覆盖点

- **connecting 状态隔离**：用 never-resolving promise 挂住
\`onConnect\`，验证**只有点击的那个 provider** button disabled，别的保持 enabled。测完
\`resolveConnect(null)\` 清理。
- **\`saving=true\` 全禁用 vs connecting 单个禁用**：两种 disable 语义独立测试。

## Test plan

- [x] 22/22 tests 本地全绿 (342ms)
- [x] \`pnpm lint\` 干净
- [x] \`npx tsc --noEmit\` 干净
- [x] 全仓 215 files / 3152 passed / 1 todo（+22 vs baseline）
- [ ] CI 绿

chore(web): 收紧 jscpd 阈值 + spec 收尾(web dedup 系列完成) (#1067)

## Summary

web 代码重复率系列 13 PR 执行完毕(#1017 基建起,至 #1063 跨 6% 目标)。**最后一步** —— 收紧 jscpd
阈值 + 更新 spec 状态为 done。

## 阈值变更

按 `ceil(obs) + 1.5%` 规则(memory `project_test_dedup_done`,Python dedup
经验沉淀):

| 配置 | 旧阈值 | obs | 新阈值 | buffer |
|------|--------|-----|--------|--------|
| `.jscpd.src.json` | 6% | 3.90% | **5.5%** | 1.6% |
| `.jscpd.tests.json` | 10% | 5.87% | **7.5%** | 1.63% |

阈值下调 **0.5%** 对 src、**2.5%** 对 tests,同时保留 1.6% 缓冲让新代码有生长空间,突破前触发 CI gate
预警。

## 系列最终成果

| 范围 | Before | After | 变化 |
|------|--------|-------|------|

test(web): SlackSetupWizard 全面覆盖 (#899 Step 5c) (#1065)

## Summary

Step 5 三件套收尾——Claw Settings Slack setup wizard (428 行) 原先 0 测试。接 #1047
Feishu / #1056 Telegram 之后第三个 wizard。

吸收前两个 PR 的 review 教训，spec 一次到位：
- **jest-dom matchers** (`toBeInTheDocument` / `toBeDisabled` /
`not.toBeInTheDocument`)
- **强断言**（验 API payload 精确）
- **无 `.not.toThrow()` 噪音 / 无冗余 waitFor**
- **前瞻处理 unhandled rejection**（源 `handleCopyManifest` 无 `.catch()`）

## 30 tests / 454 行

| 分组 | tests | 覆盖点 |
|---|---|---|
| welcome | 3 | 渲染 / cancel / getStarted |
| create-app | 6 | Slack API 外链 / 4 步编号 / manifest JSON 内容 / copy → 2s
文本切换 / clipboard 拒绝 silent failure / back+next |
| get-tokens | 2 | 5 步编号 / 导航 |
| input-tokens 验证 | 6 | 空 / bot 错前缀 / bot 太短 / app 错前缀 / 只 bot valid / 双
valid enabled + back 清 error |
| advanced config | 3 | 默认隐藏 / 展开 / 选项列表精确 |
| handleConnect | 7 | 成功 / payload defaults / token trim / advanced
overrides / 空 account fallback / Error + 非 Error rejection |
| complete | 2 | 标题描述 / done |

## 技术要点

- **`handleCopyManifest` 的 silent failure**（源 line 94-98）：`.then(...)` 无
`.catch`，clipboard 拒绝 → unhandled rejection。测试用
`process.on('unhandledRejection', ...)` 捕获防止污染 runner。
- **fake timer 最小 scope**：只在 2s revert 测试里 `vi.useFakeTimers() +
try/finally`。
- **`navigator.clipboard` stub**：`getOwnPropertyDescriptor` 快照 +
`defineProperty` 覆盖 + afterEach 恢复/删除（按 CLAUDE.md "Global mutation" 规则）。

## 观察（已记在 #1064 follow-up）

- **Hardcoded `allow_from: ['*']`** (line 110)：和 Telegram / Feishu 一样的
pattern；三个 wizards 全部有此 gap
- **`handleCopyManifest` 无 `.catch()`**：clipboard API 失败会 unhandled
reject；worth silent-failure cleanup
- 和 Feishu/Telegram 类似，也是 plan 标的 "凭证明文回显 bug-hunting" 重点之一；未发现直接明文回显，但
`allow_from` 语义 gap 是等价安全问题

## Test plan

- [x] 30/30 tests 本地全绿 (384ms)
- [x] `pnpm lint` 干净
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` 干净
- [x] 全仓 214 files / 3130 passed / 1 todo（+30 vs baseline）
- [ ] CI 绿

commit.message:
chore: add .nvmrc pinning Node to 24 (#1062)

## Summary
Add a one-line `.nvmrc` file at the repo root with `24`. Complements
#1061 (tightening `engines.node` to `>=24 <25`) — the `engines` field
*fails* CI/install when the wrong Node is used; `.nvmrc` lets nvm/fnm
*auto-switch* to the right one before that check runs.

## What changes for contributors
- `nvm use` (no arguments, from the repo root) — auto-switches to Node
24.
- `fnm use` — same; fnm reads `.nvmrc`.
- `direnv` users can add `use node` to a `.envrc` and it follows this
file.
- Pre-commit hook and `pnpm install` stop printing `WARN Unsupported
engine` for anyone who was previously on Node 25+.

## Why Node 24 specifically
Matches CI:
```yaml
# .github/workflows/code-quality.yml
- uses: actions/setup-node@v6
  with:
    node-version: '24'
```

## Not covered
- `asdf` reads `.tool-versions`, not `.nvmrc`. Anyone on asdf can open a
follow-up PR to add a `.tool-versions` file — it's one line.
- Pinning a specific minor (e.g. `24.10.0`) was considered but adds
friction for no benefit; any Node 24.x works for this project's

chore: add .nvmrc pinning Node to 24 (#1062)

## Summary
Add a one-line `.nvmrc` file at the repo root with `24`. Complements
#1061 (tightening `engines.node` to `>=24 <25`) — the `engines` field
*fails* CI/install when the wrong Node is used; `.nvmrc` lets nvm/fnm
*auto-switch* to the right one before that check runs.

## What changes for contributors
- `nvm use` (no arguments, from the repo root) — auto-switches to Node
24.
- `fnm use` — same; fnm reads `.nvmrc`.
- `direnv` users can add `use node` to a `.envrc` and it follows this
file.
- Pre-commit hook and `pnpm install` stop printing `WARN Unsupported
engine` for anyone who was previously on Node 25+.

## Why Node 24 specifically
Matches CI:
```yaml
# .github/workflows/code-quality.yml
- uses: actions/setup-node@v6
  with:
    node-version: '24'
```

## Not covered
- `asdf` reads `.tool-versions`, not `.nvmrc`. Anyone on asdf can open a
follow-up PR to add a `.tool-versions` file — it's one line.
- Pinning a specific minor (e.g. `24.10.0`) was considered but adds
friction for no benefit; any Node 24.x works for this project's
toolchain.

commit.message:
chore: tighten engines.node to >=24 <25 (#1061)

## Summary
Restrict `engines.node` from `>=24` to `>=24 <25`. Node 25 produces
silently-broken local dev state:
- vitest v4 + jsdom 26 + Node 25 combo leaves `localStorage` without a
`.clear` method at test runtime — 114 tests fail locally with
`TypeError: localStorage.clear is not a function` while CI (Node 24)
runs the same tests all green.
- In some vitest invocations on Node 25, the test discovery loop never
completes — 60+ seconds of environment boot followed by "0 tests loaded"
and non-zero exit.

## Evidence
- Same commit / same lockfile: Node 24 → 212 files / 3076 tests passed.
Node 25 → 11 files / 114 tests failing.
- Bare jsdom 26 under Node 25 works (`dom.window.localStorage.clear()`
returns `undefined` fine). The breakage is specifically in vitest's
jsdom-environment wrapper interacting with Node 25.
- CI has always been green because `setup-node@v6` pins Node 24
(`code-quality.yml`).
- pnpm already reads `engines` and warns when mismatched; after this PR,
`pnpm install` on Node 25 shows `WARN Unsupported engine`, making the
gap explicit instead of silently broken.

## Scope
- Root `package.json`: `>=24` → `>=24 <25`
- `web/package.json`: same. (`desktop/` and `services/oauth-worker/`
declare no `engines` field.)

## When to open this back up
When the toolchain (vitest / jsdom / jsdom-environment) has been
verified on the next Node major (v26+), bump the upper bound. Tracked
informally as part of periodic dep-update work — not worth a standing
issue.

## Related
- #1046 — the "investigate pre-existing localStorage.clear failure"
follow-up is resolved by this PR. Root cause turned out to be a
Node-version gap, not a test-pollution bug as originally suspected.

commit.message:
fix(openclaw): correct redeploy allowlist to preserve user data (#1060)

## Summary
Fix the pack redeploy allowlist — it was protecting pack templates
(TOOLS.md, AGENTS.md) while exposing user data (SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md,
memory/, media/).

## Changes

**File allowlist (never overwrite):**

| Before | After |
|--------|-------|
| MEMORY.md, USER.md, TOOLS.md, AGENTS.md | MEMORY.md, USER.md, SOUL.md,
IDENTITY.md |

**Copy-if-missing (new mechanism):**
- BOOTSTRAP.md — skip when local file exists (preserve in-progress
onboarding), copy when absent. Agents use its presence to decide whether
onboarding is needed.

**Dir allowlist (never overwrite):**

| Before | After |
|--------|-------|
| data/, artifacts/, zip/ | data/, artifacts/, zip/, memory/, media/ |

## Test plan
- [x] Updated 3 allowlist assertions + added BOOTSTRAP.md
copy-if-missing assertions
- [x] All 79 unit tests pass

refactor(web): T2-f useCanvasChat spec 抽 renderAgentAndSend helper (#1059)

## Summary

useCanvasChat spec 12 个 streaming test 重复 7 行 pattern:

```ts
const params = makeDefaultParams()
params.chatMode = 'agent' as const
const { result } = renderHook(() => useCanvasChat(params))

await act(async () => {
  await result.current.sendMessage('Agent task')
})

const callbacks = mockStartStream.mock.calls[0][1]
```

这是 jscpd 识别的**最大 block**:L291-334 master,被 10+ 处 clone(14 行块 × 2 + 12 行块
× 多),贡献 tests dup 的 ~0.4%。

**抽 `renderAgentAndSend(message)` helper**:
- 内嵌 `makeDefaultParams` + agent mode + renderHook + sendMessage + 捕获
`mockStartStream` callbacks
- 返回 `{ params, result, callbacks }` 给 test 做进一步 mock 调用断言

**`replace_all` 一次吃 12 处 identical `'Agent task'` 样板**。其他
variants('Hello' × 4、'Generate X' × 多种)因 chatMode/sessionId/其他 params
调整不同,**保留 inline** —— 强塞 helper 会让参数膨胀 4-5 个字段反而不清晰。

## 重复率变化

- **tests: 6.70% → 6.31%**(279 → 261 clones,**-0.39%**,-68 行 diff)
- 距离目标阈值 **6% 剩 0.31%**,一个 PR 应能跨过

tests/unit/canvas-hooks/useCanvasChat.unit.spec.ts` 32/32 全绿

commit.message:
test(web): finish jest-dom migration for components/ (variable-ref form) (#1058)

## Summary
- Finish the components/ jest-dom migration started in #1029: 12
variable-reference presence assertions across 6 files, swapped from
`.toBeDefined()` / `.not.toBeNull()` / `.toBeNull()` to the jest-dom
semantic equivalents.
- Pure 1:1 matcher swap — net line change is 0 (12 insertions / 12
deletions).

## Context
#1029 migrated 148 inline-query sites
(`expect(screen.getByX(...)).toBeDefined()`) but intentionally left the
variable-reference form (`const el = getByX(...);
expect(el).toBeDefined()`) alone — those needed per-site verification
that the variable actually holds a DOM element before the matcher swap
is safe. #1037 later added a lint rule catching the inline form; that
rule does **not** cover variable-reference form. This PR closes that
gap.

Each of the 12 sites was verified to hold `HTMLElement` / `Element`
(from `getByText`, `getByTestId`, or `container.querySelector`). Nothing
is assuming presence based on JS-value truthiness.

## Sites
| File | Sites | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `MarkdownContent.unit.spec.tsx` | 6 (`blurImg`, `sharpImg`, `video`,
`iframe`, `btn`) | `container.querySelector(...) as HTMLElement` |
| `AssetsPanel.unit.spec.tsx` | 1 (`img`) |
`container.querySelector(...) as HTMLElement` |
| `ProgressiveImage.unit.spec.tsx` | 2 (`blur`, `container`) |
`screen.getByTestId(...)` |
| `UserAvatar.unit.spec.tsx` | 1 (`img`) |
`container.querySelector('img[alt="..."]')` |
| `billing/DowngradeConfirmModal.unit.spec.tsx` | 1 (`list`) |
`screen.getByText(...)` |
| `billing/PlanCard.unit.spec.tsx` | 1 (`svg` — ribbon hidden) |
`container.querySelector('svg')` → `.not.toBeInTheDocument()` |

## Explicitly skipped
`tests/unit/components/types.unit.spec.ts:9` —
`expect(types).toBeDefined()` where `types` is `await
import('@/components/AgentChatClient/types')` — a JS module namespace,
not a DOM element. Left alone.

## hooks/ — surveyed, nothing to migrate
Initially planned to bundle `hooks/` migration into this PR. A targeted
grep found **0 inline-query sites** (hook tests use `renderHook()`, not
`render()`, so they don't have `screen.getByText` patterns) and **9
variable-reference sites** — all non-DOM
(`result.current.mmDisplayMessages`, mock handler functions, URL
strings). jest-dom matchers don't apply to any of them. `hooks/` is left
untouched.

## Verification
- `npx tsc --noEmit` green.
- `pnpm lint` green.

Note on local test run: my local `.pnpm/node_modules/vitest` still has
an orphan symlink to `vitest@1.6.1` from pre-#1049 state, which causes
`Invalid Chai property: toBeInTheDocument` locally. This is strictly a
local filesystem artifact — `pnpm-lock.yaml` has zero `vitest@1.*`
references post-#1049, so CI's fresh install will not reproduce it. CI
is the source of truth here.

## Follow-ups (#1046)
- [ ] Migrate `app/` directory (29/50 files with DOM rendering) — next
batch.
- [ ] Investigate pre-existing `localStorage.clear is not a function`
failures (CI green, local-only manifestation — confirmed to be test
pollution per web/CLAUDE.md's `Object.assign` warning).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(web): T2-e useOpenClawChat spec 抽 renderClawChat/renderStreamingChat helper (#1054)

## Summary

useOpenClawChat spec 30 个 test 有 2 大重复簇:

1. **send-message flow 样板**(15 处):`mockWsStatus = 'connected'` + `const
{ result } = renderHook(() => useOpenClawChat(getMockWs()))`
2. **streaming test 样板**(8 处):`const { handlers } =
setupWithEventCapture()` + `renderHook(...)` + `const sessionKey =
result.current.sessionKey` + `const chatHandler = handlers[0]`

**抽 2 个 helper 到顶层**:
- `renderClawChat(wsStatus?)` — 设 status + renderHook,default
`'connected'`
- `renderStreamingChat()` — 捕获 onEvent handler array + renderHook,return
`{ result, handlers, chatHandler, sessionKey }`

**替换方式**:
- `replace_all` 吃 15 处 `const { result } = renderHook(...)` →
`renderClawChat()`
- `replace_all` 吃 12 处冗余前导 `mockWsStatus = 'connected'` 行(helper 已设)
- 2 处 disconnected test 手改 `renderClawChat('disconnected')`
- `replace_all` 吃 8 处 `setupWithEventCapture + renderClawChat +
sessionKey` 3 行块 → `renderStreamingChat()` destructure
- `replace_all` 吃 `const chatHandler = handlers[0]` 冗余行
- 3 处 tool step test 手改 destructure 保留 `handlers` 访问(tool handler 是
`handlers[1]`)
- 删除 dead `setupWithEventCapture` local function

## 重复率变化

- **tests: 6.79% → 6.71%**(279 → 271 clones,**-0.08%**,-35 行 diff)
- 距离目标阈值 **6% 剩 0.71%**

commit.message:
test(web): FeishuSetupModal 全面覆盖 (#899 Step 5) (#1047)

## Summary

Coverage 推进 plan Step 5——Claw Settings 的 Feishu setup modal (246 行) 原先 0
测试。Step 5 三个 wizards 里最小 / 自包含度最高，先拿下作为热身。

## 24 tests / 365 行 / 覆盖清单

**4 phase 迁移 × 2 种 timer**：

| 分组 | tests | 覆盖点 |
|---|---|---|
| initial render | 2 | loading phase + startFeishuSetup 参数映射 |
| QR phase | 3 | QR SVG value / 5:00 格式 / 0:09 leading-zero |
| startSetup 失败 | 2 | Error 消息 + 非 Error "Failed to start setup"
fallback |
| polling 正常结果 | 6 | success / expired / denied / error+message /
error+fallback / pending 保持 |
| polling throw | 4 | 单次不降级 / 3 次累积降级 / 非 Error fallback / 成功重置计数 |
| countdown | 1 | 0 → expired phase |
| cancel | 2 | cancelFeishuSetup + onClose / rejection 静默 |
| retry | 1 | 错误后 startFeishuSetup 再次调用 |
| success 交互 | 1 | onSuccess + onClose 都触发 |
| unmount cleanup | 2 | session 启动后 cancel API / 未启动前不 cancel |

## 技术

- **fake timer + `vi.advanceTimersByTimeAsync + act`**：精确推进 5s polling +
1s countdown，每处用完 `afterEach` 强制 `useRealTimers()` 防泄漏
- **`mockRejectedValueOnce` 链 + `mockResolvedValueOnce`**：模拟 2 fail + 1
success + 1 fail 验证 `consecutiveErrorsRef` 重置逻辑
- **`qrcode.react` stub**：带 `data-qr-value` / `data-qr-size` 的可查 div，避免真
QR 渲染开销
- **`console.error` spy** 处理 source 的故意 debug logging（不污染测试输出）

## Test plan

- [x] 24/24 tests 本地全绿 (589ms)
- [x] `pnpm lint` 干净
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` 干净
- [x] 全仓 `pnpm test:unit` 213 files / 3100 passed / 1 todo（+24 vs
baseline）
- [ ] CI 绿

commit.message:
chore(web): remove dead pnpm block from web/package.json (#1051)

## Summary
Delete `web/package.json`'s `pnpm.overrides` +
`pnpm.onlyBuiltDependencies`. pnpm ≥ 8 ignores `pnpm.*` in workspace
child packages — only the root `package.json` block is honored. CI has
been printing two warnings on every install for this reason, and the
block has been dead code since the switch.

## Why this is a behavioral no-op
- **`overrides`** — `{flatted, fast-xml-parser, undici}` is
character-for-character identical to the root's block. Only the root
copy was ever honored.
- **`onlyBuiltDependencies`** — 5/7 entries (`@sentry/cli`, `esbuild`,
`protobufjs`, `sharp`, `workerd`) are already in the root allowlist. The
remaining 2 — `@firebase/util` and `@swc/core` — have had their
postinstall scripts **skipped the entire time** pnpm was ignoring this
block (CI shows `Ignored build scripts: @firebase/util@1.13.0, ...` on
every run). Main has been building and passing tests without those
postinstalls running, which is the empirical proof they are not
required.

If `@firebase/util` or `@swc/core` postinstalls ever turn out to be
needed, they should be added to the **root** allowlist with a documented
reason — tracked as a follow-up in #1046.

## Verification
- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` succeeds; `pnpm-lock.yaml` unchanged.
- `pnpm install` still lists `@firebase/util@1.13.0` under "Ignored
build scripts" — confirming its skip status is unchanged.
- `pnpm lint`, `npx tsc --noEmit`, and pilot vitest runs all green.
- Expected positive effect: two `WARN The field "pnpm.*" was found in
web/package.json. This will not take effect.` messages stop appearing in
CI install logs.

commit.message:
chore(web): pin vitest via pnpm.overrides, drop #1029 runtime workaround (#1049)

## Summary
- Root `pnpm.overrides` pins the vitest family (`vitest`,
`@vitest/expect`, `@vitest/runner`, `@vitest/spy`, `@vitest/utils`,
`@vitest/snapshot`) to `^4`. Prior state had `vitest@4.0.18` (web's
direct dep) and `vitest@1.6.1` (transitive) coexisting, which caused the
class of bugs #1029 had to work around.
- Drop the manual `expect.extend(matchers)` from `web/vitest.setup.ts`.
With one-and-only-one vitest in the graph, jest-dom's `/vitest` entry
binds to the right `expect` on its own.

— it's required because vitest v4 keeps `Assertion<T>` in
`@vitest/expect` and jest-dom's upstream `declare module 'vitest'`
targets the wrong module. That's a vitest v4 architectural fact,
independent of the pnpm version issue.

The original draft of this PR also cleaned up `web/package.json`'s dead
`pnpm` block (ignored by pnpm — CI prints a warning on every run) and
consolidated its `onlyBuiltDependencies` items (`@firebase/util`,
`@swc/core`) into the root. That cleanup is scope-creep against the
one-PR-one-step convention:
- The dead block is visible tech debt but orthogonal to the vitest fix.
- Moving `@firebase/util` / `@swc/core` to the root allowlist would
activate postinstall scripts pnpm has been silently skipping — a
behavioral change that deserves its own review.

The clean-up is reverted here and tracked as a follow-up (see #1046).

- `pnpm-lock.yaml` shrinks by ~750 lines — the entire `vitest@1.6.1`
subtree is gone.

`@vitest/expect@4.0.18` (previously reported both `4.0.18` and `1.6.1`).
- `pnpm lint` green.
- `pnpm test:unit` delta vs main = **0 new failures**. The 11 files /
114 tests failing on `localStorage.clear is not a function` are the same
pre-existing issue tracked in #1046.

- [ ] Clean up `web/package.json`'s dead `pnpm` block + decide whether
`@firebase/util` / `@swc/core` postinstalls should run.
- [ ] Remaining variable-reference assertion migrations (`hooks/`,
`app/`).

function` failure.

commit.message:
feat(ci): block oversized assets with pre-commit hook and CI gate (#1039)

## 背景

设计师偶尔把未优化的大图/GIF 直接 commit 进仓库（存量如 `web/public/themes/panda-claw/w.gif`
13M、`nano-banana-2-hero.png` 6M），增加前端 bundle 体积和首屏负担。现有
`scripts/check-pr-size.sh` 主动排除所有二进制文件（职责是行数预算），素材字节数完全不设防。

本 PR 建立两层防线：

1. **本地 pre-commit**：自动用 sharp 无损压缩新增/修改的 PNG/JPG/WebP 并
re-stage，超阈值只警告不阻断 —— 保证设计师工作流顺畅。
2. **CI `asset-size-guard`**：硬上限，压缩后仍超阈值直接 fail PR。

## 设计要点

- **范围**：`web/public/**` + `ios/ZooClaw/ZooClaw/Assets.xcassets/**`（iOS
CLAUDE.md 不动）
- **阈值**：PNG/JPG 500KB · WebP 300KB · GIF 1MB · MP4/MOV 2MB · SVG 100KB
- **存量豁免**：CI 只检查 `git diff --diff-filter=ACMR origin/main..HEAD`
选出的新增/修改文件，历史超标老素材放过；一旦 modify 就回归新规则
- **自动 re-stage**：pre-commit 优化工作树文件后会 `git add` 重新入 index（lint-staged
模式），避免 "优化了但 commit 的还是原文件" 的坑
- **Worktree 兼容**：`git rev-parse --git-dir` 取真实 gitdir，备份写
`<git-dir>/asset-backup/`
- **Summary job 联动**：`asset-size-guard` 已加入 `code-quality` summary 的
needs + 判定脚本，branch protection 生效

## 本地验证

| Case | 结果 |
|---|---|
| 662KB 可压缩 PNG staged | sharp 压到 206KB 并自动 re-stage，index blob 变更 ✓ |
| 614KB 随机字节 PNG | sharp 读不通 → warning 不阻断，commit 退出 0 ✓ |
| 无 staged asset | 脚本静默退出 0 ✓ |
| YAML 语法 | `yaml.safe_load` 通过 ✓ |

CI 端 fail path 尚未本地验证 —— 本 PR 合并前会在此分支追加一个超大测试文件推一轮，观察
`asset-size-guard` 红叉，确认后 revert。

## 风险

1. **Sharp 原地优化是破坏性的** — 已 mitigate：先 copy 到
`<git-dir>/asset-backup/<basename>.<sha16>.bak`，optimize 后仅在"更小"时 rename
覆盖
2. **Rename 噪声**：`--diff-filter=ACMR` 包含 rename；视为 feature（大文件 rename
值得重新审视大小）

## Test plan

- [x] 本地 `node scripts/check-asset-size.mjs --mode=precommit` 三个 case
- [x] YAML 语法
- [ ] CI `asset-size-guard` 在违规文件的 PR 上 fail（见本 PR 后续 commit）
- [ ] CI `asset-size-guard` 在合规文件的 PR 上 pass
- [ ] `code-quality` summary 把 asset-size-guard 的结果正确汇总

refactor(web): T2-b useSSEStream spec 引入 runStartStream helper (#1041)

## Summary

useSSEStream spec 947 行,18 处重复 ~15 行 startStream 样板(renderHook +
3-callback bag + DEFAULT_PAYLOAD + `await act(() => startStream(...))`)。

**抽 2 个 helper**:
- `makeCallbacks(withCredits?)` — 构造 3-cb 或 4-cb
bag(onInsufficientCredits 可选)
- `runStartStream(opts?)` — `renderHook` + `startStream` 一体,return `{
result, callbacks }`。payload 默认 `{ agentName: 'test-agent', uid:
'user-1', sessionId: 'sess-1', message: 'Hello' }`,hookOptions 默认 `{
sessionId: 'sess-1' }`,都可通过 `opts` 覆盖

**替换方式**(`pattern-clear → replace_all`,`variation → targeted Edit`):
- `replace_all` 吃 6 处 identical `{ agentName: 'a', uid: 'u', sessionId:
'sess-1', message: 'hi' }` 样板
- `replace_all` 吃 若干处 DEFAULT_PAYLOAD + 3-cb identical 块
- 1 处 targeted Edit: onInsufficientCredits test 用 `makeCallbacks(true)`
覆盖

**刻意保留** ~10 处 variations(不同 hookOptions/payload/inline callback 组合)——
每处有 per-test 微差,强替换会让 helper 接口过宽。留后续 PR 或作为可接受样板差异。

## 重复率变化

- **tests: 7.20% → 6.92%**(283 → 280 clones,**-0.28%**,-70 duplicate
lines)
- 距离目标阈值 6% 只剩 **0.92%**,下一 PR(T2-c useLiteLLMApi 13 处)应能跨过

全绿

commit.message:
chore(web): eslint 规则拦截 expect(getBy*/findBy*).toBeDefined() (#1037)

## Summary

Follow-up to #1035——加规则防复发。

#1035 清除了仓库里 29 处冗余 `expect(getBy*/findBy*).toBeDefined()`。但"冗余 +
易复制"的模板一旦存在就会持续传染（本仓库同模式跨 3 PR、3 个文件、半年时间）。加 ESLint 规则在 CI
层硬阻断，让下一个开发者复制粘贴时秒报错。

## 规则

`tests/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}` override block 下 `no-restricted-syntax` 新增
2 条 selector：

| Selector | 匹配 |
|---|---|
| sync | `expect(getByX(...)).toBeDefined()` |
| async | `expect(await findByX(...)).toBeDefined()` |

前缀 `getBy / findBy / getAllBy / findAllBy` 精确命中 RTL 查询 API，不误伤：
- `querySelector(...)` / `.querySelectorAll(...)` —— DOM API 返回 null
不抛，`.toBeDefined()` 对它**有意义**
- 自定义 helper（非 `getBy/findBy` 前缀）
- `expect(queryByX(...)).not.toBeNull()` —— `queryBy*` 返回 null 不抛，保留

## Sanity check（本地已做）

临时创建含两种违反 pattern 的测试文件 → `pnpm lint` 报 2 errors（精确命中），符合预期；smoketest
文件已删。仓库当前零违反（基线由 #1035 铺平）。

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm lint` 干净（0 违反）
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` 干净
- [x] Smoketest 证明 2 条 selector 都精确触发
- [ ] CI 绿

chore(web): eslint 规则拦截 expect(getBy*/findBy*).toBeDefined() (#1037)

## Summary

Follow-up to #1035——加规则防复发。

#1035 清除了仓库里 29 处冗余 `expect(getBy*/findBy*).toBeDefined()`。但"冗余 +
易复制"的模板一旦存在就会持续传染（本仓库同模式跨 3 PR、3 个文件、半年时间）。加 ESLint 规则在 CI
层硬阻断，让下一个开发者复制粘贴时秒报错。

## 规则

`tests/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}` override block 下 `no-restricted-syntax` 新增
2 条 selector：

| Selector | 匹配 |
|---|---|
| sync | `expect(getByX(...)).toBeDefined()` |
| async | `expect(await findByX(...)).toBeDefined()` |

前缀 `getBy / findBy / getAllBy / findAllBy` 精确命中 RTL 查询 API，不误伤：
- `querySelector(...)` / `.querySelectorAll(...)` —— DOM API 返回 null
不抛，`.toBeDefined()` 对它**有意义**
- 自定义 helper（非 `getBy/findBy` 前缀）
- `expect(queryByX(...)).not.toBeNull()` —— `queryBy*` 返回 null 不抛，保留

## Sanity check（本地已做）

临时创建含两种违反 pattern 的测试文件 → `pnpm lint` 报 2 errors（精确命中），符合预期；smoketest
文件已删。仓库当前零违反（基线由 #1035 铺平）。
